feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to add new structure in LTMC template using LTMOM
entry.content:
Is there comprehensive documentation about creation and/or customization of migration objects?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use Temporary Tables at Migration Cockpit during a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition project
entry.content:
Hi there!

I would like to know if is is possible to use Temporary Tables at Migration Cockpit during a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition project.

entry.title: Direct Transfer - BAdI for Selection : how to debug ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Scenario : Data Migration : SAP ERP 6.0 --> S/4HANA
Approach : Direct Transfer

I have implemented the concept "BAdI for Selection", to apply more complex filtering.

In Migration Cockpit, I run the step "Select Data". It ends with an error. The returned messages do not contain any error message. (the migration object in LTMOM is closed, so there is no locking issue)

How can I debug my BAdI implementation ?
Is there a way to run the logic of the BAdI implementation in debug mode, to see what the root cause is of the error during the "Get Data" step ?

Many thanks

Hans

entry.title: BAdI for Selection : delete a customer : in which tables ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Scenario : Data Migration : SAP ERP 6.0 --> S/4HANA
Approach : Direct Transfer
Migration Object : Customer

I'm implementing the "BAdI for Selection" concept, in order to apply a complex filter logic on Customers.

Purpose is to apply a filter on Customers.

In which tables do I need to filter in the code of the method IF_CNV_OR_OBT_PRESEL_BADI~PROCESS_DATA ?

Is it sufficient to filter in the table KNA1, or do I have to filter in all the tables of the migration object "Customer" (ADRC, ADR2, ADR3, ...KNAS, KNAT, KNVI, ...)

Many thanks

Hans

entry.title: What's the importance of the user DDIC in the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We currently have a business requirement of deactivating the user DDIC in our SAP S/4HANA 2022 system, but after doing so, all processes and activities of the Migration Cockpit have stopped working.

Could you explain how the user DDIC interacts with the Migration Cockpit and how could we mitigate such situation?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: LTMOM : Add to Transport Request : Combination of objects with and without Transport Organizer ...
entry.content:
Dear All,

In LTMOM (Object Modeler), I do not succeed in adding a Migration Project to a Transport Request.

Error Message : Combination of objects with  and without Transport Organizer monitoring.

 

Clicking on the "Documentation"-icon of the error message shows : 

Diagnosis

Object R3TR PE02 5791CFCF31D31EEEB49949E0808E9684, which is not checked by the Transport Organizer, and object R3TR TRUL Z1SSQQQTO9M4RFY24QX, which is checked, cannot be edited in the same request.

Only objects of the same type can be edited in the same request.

entry.title: Enable Mapping task in Custom LTMOM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a custom migration object from scratch with our custom FM for pricing and customer credit profile. This is working fine without any error but the mapping task is not getting enabled. When we are trying to assign any rules as well, we are getting only getting MOVE option and no standard rules are present.

Can you please help and provide your expertise n how to resolve the same.

entry.title: Update Supplier Master Data through migration cockpit
entry.content:
I just uploaded supplier master data through migration cockpit, but I forgot to fill in the purchasing organization data sheet. I tried to re upload with only fill in the Purchasing Organization Data sheet and General Data sheet (the mandatory column only). but i can not upload transfer the data to staging tables, the error message is Cannot insert 1100000090 into table /1LT/DSZOS000097 (S_SUPPL_GEN); instance already exists in the table. But if I am not fill in the data in General Data sheet, I still can't upload the data , the error message is 

Sheet General Data, field BP Grouping, row 9 is empty; enter value for the mandatory field.

Is there any guide to update the master data thru migration cokcpit?

SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: Details of Customers' Certificates is made mandatory in customer master template migration cockpit.
entry.content:
Dear All,

While uploading the customer master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud I saw the sheet with name "Certificate Details", and it's been marked as mandatory. 

The screenshot of the definition of certificate I have attached for your ref.

I have also gone through the SAP Help portal; there it mentioned that for India it's been marked as mandatory. The address linked I have added here for reference. - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/b251af240d9c41e9b9baf94603b9491a.html?locale=en-US&q=business%20partner%20certificate%20india

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/38118c6119ec4bfcb43ff5bbec1fd818.html?locale=en-US&q=business%20partner%20ceryificate%20indis

So, how to upload of customer master data successfully using migration cockpit If I don't have any "Certificate Details" from the client end for customer master?

Any help is appreciated!  

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit SAP S/4HANA business partner

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 Migration Object list
entry.content:
Where can i find the customer hierarchy migration object and migration template 

I checked the help documentation it does not have Customer Hierarchy Object

entry.title: Currently we are trying to migrate the data from other ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud 2402
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Currently we are trying to migrate the data from Non SAP ERP to SAP S/4 Hana public cloud. We are facing the challenges regarding the G/l account migration. Our client opt for :-

1) Changing the account groups from the standard to user specific. For example changing the existing the balance sheet account group ABST(Standard) to CURA(Current assets),CURL(Current liabilities).

2)After that Mapping the existing standard G/L's with the client G/L's and adding the additional g/l's

3) Re - numbering of the G/L accounts and adding the additional g/l accounts

->The challenges we are facing is that, We need to create so many g/l accounts so is there any mass upload process available for the upload of g/l accounts in the public cloud 2402?

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP General Ledger Migration 

We have planned to follow below process please suggest the best process to meet the above requirements :- 

 

1copy the existing configuration of g/l's 
2Create New g/l account groups and transfer the existing data to that new account groups 
3Create additional vendor and customer account groups and recon accounts for that account groups as per the client requirement 
4Create additional bank incoming , outgoing , main bank account for house banks  as per the client requirement 
5do the renumbering 
6

create new g/l's that are not suitable with the pre delivered g/l's

entry.title: Error in Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello!Enterprise Resource Planning Q&A

I am trying to migrate something with the Migration Cockpit 2021 (App Migrate Your Data).
Does anyone know why I get this error message? I got it for different objects and its really anoying because I dont have any idea what WLRL or TRCO means.

The message:

According to the TRCO settings, the given transformation rule mapping entry (see context) for transformation rule MAP_IMRC_POINT must be completed by entering the value 000001003576 of WLRL field RLPAR_0004 in the EV_IMRC_POINT field of the transformation rule mapping.

An inconsistency occurred, as a different value is already present in this field for the given mapping entry. This value is not overwritten.

Kind regards
S. Erem

entry.title: Hello everyone! How can i migrate my data In S4/HANA on premise, from "T" system to "P"?
Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels - Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am trying to extend an existing vendor to a new purchasing organization by filling in the 'General Data' and 'Purchasing Organization Data' tabs in the template with the values of Vendor, Purchasing Organization, Order Currency, and Terms of Payment. I am getting an error stating that the Vendor already exists. What could be the issue and how can I proceed to extend the vendors?

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Direct transfer - Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

Where are willing to migrate from a SAP ECC to a SAP S/4HANA system and we are wondering if we could use for the migration process the migration cockpit direct transfer from sap tool.

We would like to know if it's convenient to use these migration cockpit option instead of the data staging tables as we have searched that with these option there's no need to fill a file with the information needed and if we could use it with every single data migration object including transactional data (sales orders, accounts payable, accounts receivable, g/l balance) and master data (cost centers, accounts, ...)

If so, is there any chance that the process could affect the data that is reading from the SAP ECC system, as we have seen that is recommended to read from non-productive systems?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: LTMOM : Rule xxx is corrupt : How to find the name of the rule ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

In LTMOM (Object Modeler), I'm running a "Check" of a Migration Object :

 

The result is : Rule xxx is corrupt, where xxx is the ID of the rule, see this screenshot :

How can I find the name of the rule ? How do I know which rule exactly is corrupt ?

entry.title: Migration cockpit in fiori
entry.content:
During lsmw, in the final step, we get a option for "display errors only".

With that feature, the system stops the mass upload whenever it finds an error.

And until the user inputs the correct data the lsmw will not continue. This is a very good feature, so that the data upload will continue after the correct data input.

I need to know that Likewise is there any same feature or option while we load data through migration cockpit in fiori?

 

If yes then please let me know.

 

Cheers.

entry.title: How to use XML file in Data Migration
entry.content:
Issue while downloading template from LTMC.

"error on line 2 at column 6: XML declaration allowed only at the start of the document"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA readiness check: check failure
entry.content:
Hey there!

we are facing the following issue when executing the ATC checks for S/4HANA readiness:

 

 

 

Object not checkable, due to inconsistent configuration: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																									
Check failures: 		(3 Check Failures) 																																																																																																																		
Object Name:RSNAST00  	 Object Type: PROG
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V60A  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.
Object Name:V61B  	 Object Type: FUGR
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1G/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.

 

 

 

 

At least the 1st failure come from an enhancement.

We have not figured out where the other two check failures come from.

Additionally the mentioned namespace /0SJ1G/ seems weird, because none of the objects belong to this namespace.

The reason why we cannot ignore these check failures is, that it prevents us from selecting the check run with "Analyze result in ATC problems view". If we do, no findings will be displayed.

From our point of view there are not SAP-notes that fit to the problem.

System information:

SAP_BASIS 758
SAP_ABA 75I

Does anyone have a clue, what we could check?

The system says: the SAP-owned namespace is in scope. But how can this namespace be in scope if we explicitely select a different package in the check run and mark "Include Objects from checkable namespaces"?

Thanks for any hint!

/edit:

I know put the enhancements in a new package and excluded this package from the search run. Now there are no more errors. But: The findings cannot be displayed. I found out that the following error in eclipse ATC problems view occurred:

An internal error occurred during: "Displaying result in ATC Problems View".

System failure: "SQL error SQL code: 4 occurred while accessing table SATC_CI_CF_E_BASE_NAC." (For detailed information, check the generated short dump in transaction ST22 of system "F4S")

/edit2

it seems as if the error ocurred only once. there is still "Findings: None", but no error anymore.
